programme.title: Undercurrents
programme.desc: Undercurrents explores connection and compassion through the eyes of two female surfers as they share their motivation time after time to go back to the water despite cold waves, fears and little reward. Bringing in ideas from the Blue Mind movement and science of mindfulness, get ready to flow with the blue ocean as we explore the relationship with the sea to find out what happens when we pursue what we love.Arlene Maltman is one of first British & European female surfing champions. Natalie Fox is a Yogi, Surf instructor and marine activist. Throughout the film, they share their experiences and relationship with the sea.Neuroscientist & Mindfulness innovator Dr Tamara Russell & Blue Health Coach / Blue Mind Advocate, Lizzi Larbalestier provide expertise on how our minds and bodies are connected to the ocean and how this can have a benefit to our health and wellbeing.Awards:New Talent Award – Adventure Uncovered Film Festival 2020. Best Adventure Film – Shexreme Film Festival 2019.

programme.title: Inside Sailing - Episode 6
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Undercurrents
programme.desc: Undercurrents explores connection and compassion through the eyes of two female surfers as they share their motivation time after time to go back to the water despite cold waves, fears and little reward. Bringing in ideas from the Blue Mind movement and science of mindfulness, get ready to flow with the blue ocean as we explore the relationship with the sea to find out what happens when we pursue what we love.Arlene Maltman is one of first British & European female surfing champions. Natalie Fox is a Yogi, Surf instructor and marine activist. Throughout the film, they share their experiences and relationship with the sea.Neuroscientist & Mindfulness innovator Dr Tamara Russell & Blue Health Coach / Blue Mind Advocate, Lizzi Larbalestier provide expertise on how our minds and bodies are connected to the ocean and how this can have a benefit to our health and wellbeing.Awards:New Talent Award – Adventure Uncovered Film Festival 2020. Best Adventure Film – Shexreme Film Festival 2019.

programme.title: Discovering Watersports On Terceira
programme.desc: Terceira, on the Azores Islands, is a nautical sporting paradise for many. From pro surfers to passionate sailors, we dive into the lives of local athletes that are fortunate to call this island home.Discovering Watersports On Terceira joins athletes from different categories on their nautical challenges on their way to excellence. However, it also centers on the human aspect, checking on secret spots used by these water enthusiasts as well as lifestyle in the Azores Islands.Join us in their adventure, here on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Inside Sailing - Episode 6
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 9: Rijeka, Opatija, Lika
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Discovering Watersports On Terceira
programme.desc: Terceira, on the Azores Islands, is a nautical sporting paradise for many. From pro surfers to passionate sailors, we dive into the lives of local athletes that are fortunate to call this island home.Discovering Watersports On Terceira joins athletes from different categories on their nautical challenges on their way to excellence. However, it also centers on the human aspect, checking on secret spots used by these water enthusiasts as well as lifestyle in the Azores Islands.Join us in their adventure, here on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 15
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 9: Rijeka, Opatija, Lika
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 3
programme.desc: We have left the island of Stromboli and headed towards the Strait of Messina, the famous stretch that separates Calabria from Sicily. This strait is also famous for the strange games that locals play, sparked by the imagination of ancient sea creatures like Scylla and Charybdis, the monsters that Ullyses had to fight to get back home. Sea monsters, beautiful landscapes and original dishes await us in this episode on board the Ghibellina.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 15
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Rios Patagonicos
programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 3
programme.desc: We have left the island of Stromboli and headed towards the Strait of Messina, the famous stretch that separates Calabria from Sicily. This strait is also famous for the strange games that locals play, sparked by the imagination of ancient sea creatures like Scylla and Charybdis, the monsters that Ullyses had to fight to get back home. Sea monsters, beautiful landscapes and original dishes await us in this episode on board the Ghibellina.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1977, the Cannes Yachting Festival takes place every September in elegant, luxurious surroundings in the sparkling bay of Cannes. We are ready for the 2018 edition that promises the latest trends in the nautical industry. Jump on board the 2018 Cannes Yachting Festival to discover superyachts, equipment, regattas, competitions and more.

programme.title: Rios Patagonicos
programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

programme.title: The Irish Gathering
programme.desc: The Nautical Channel team travels to Ireland to meet up with the Gathering Cruise at Kinsale. We will be discovering the sailing and culture of the West Coast as we meet up the gathering cruise, visit a classic boat regatta and sample some delicious Irish gourmet meals. However, the trip will take a turn as rough seas and strong wind turn their leisure cruise into a rescue operation. Will our crew be okay in the Irish cold waters? Let's find out in The Irish Gathering!

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1977, the Cannes Yachting Festival takes place every September in elegant, luxurious surroundings in the sparkling bay of Cannes. We are ready for the 2018 edition that promises the latest trends in the nautical industry. Jump on board the 2018 Cannes Yachting Festival to discover superyachts, equipment, regattas, competitions and more.

We will be discovering the sailing and culture of the West Coast as we meet up the gathering cruise, visit a classic boat regatta and sample some delicious Irish gourmet meals. However, the trip will take a turn as rough seas and strong wind turn their leisure cruise into a rescue operation. Will our crew be okay in the Irish cold waters? programme.title: Rios Patagonicos
programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 3
programme.desc: We have left the island of Stromboli and headed towards the Strait of Messina, the famous stretch that separates Calabria from Sicily. This strait is also famous for the strange games that locals play, sparked by the imagination of ancient sea creatures like Scylla and Charybdis, the monsters that Ullyses had to fight to get back home. programme.title: Discovering Watersports On Terceira
programme.desc: Terceira, on the Azores Islands, is a nautical sporting paradise for many. From pro surfers to passionate sailors, we dive into the lives of local athletes that are fortunate to call this island home.Discovering Watersports On Terceira joins athletes from different categories on their nautical challenges on their way to excellence. However, it also centers on the human aspect, checking on secret spots used by these water enthusiasts as well as lifestyle in the Azores Islands.Join us in their adventure, here on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Rios Patagonicos
programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

programme.desc: We have left the island of Stromboli and headed towards the Strait of Messina, the famous stretch that separates Calabria from Sicily. programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 3
programme.desc: We have left the island of Stromboli and headed towards the Strait of Messina, the famous stretch that separates Calabria from Sicily. This strait is also famous for the strange games that locals play, sparked by the imagination of ancient sea creatures like Scylla and Charybdis, the monsters that Ullyses had to fight to get back home. Sea monsters, beautiful landscapes and original dishes await us in this episode on board the Ghibellina.

programme.title: Rios Patagonicos
programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.
